heading: Retroactive effect
label: 1430 Retroactive effect
text: This Act shall not be effective with respect to price support operations for any agricultural commodity for any marketing year or season commencing prior to , except to the extent that the Secretary of Agriculture shall, without reducing price support theretofore undertaken or announced, elect to apply the provisions of this Act.January 1, 1950
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , known as the Agricultural Act of 1949, which is classified principally to this chapter (§ 1421 et seq.). For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.act Oct. 31, 1949, ch. 79263 Stat. 1051section 1421 of this title
